---
title: "data_aquisition"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
```

```{r}
md_um_plain <- read_csv("united_methodist_md.csv") |> clean_names() |> 
  mutate(column = str_trim(str_split_fixed(church, ",", 4)[,2]))

md_united_methodist <- read_csv("united_methodist_md.csv") |> clean_names() |> 
  filter(str_detect(church, "MD")) |> 
  mutate(church = str_trim(str_split_fixed(church, ",", 3)[,2]))|> 
  mutate(church = str_remove(church, ","))

md_towns_counties <- read_csv("MD_City_Lookup_Table (1).csv") |> clean_names()

md_um_combined <- md_united_methodist |> 
  inner_join(md_towns_counties, join_by(church == city)) |> 
  select(church, county)

pg_um_churches <- md_um_combined |> 
  filter(str_detect(county, "Prince George's County"))

pg_county_ame <- 
```
